_comment: Graphics Image Protocol (GIP) prompt bands. MIN is a HARD floor (AF-GIP-PROMPT-FLOOR): a prompt under its band floor is NOT submitted. MAX mirrors MODEL-SPECS tier caps (AF-DIU-PROMPT-CAP). Bands are per asset class x tier, because graphics surfaces differ (a photoreal draft is not a text-bearing ad). Numbers are operator-ratifiable (see CROSS-TOPIC open question 5); rationale cited inline. Enforced by 45-design-intelligence-library/scripts/diu_validator.py prompt-band and SOP-GIP-01.

applies_to: social post graphic with baked text
text_bearing_long._rationale: Skill 49/56 already prove 5,000-19,000-char image prompts under fail-closed provers (social-media how-to:232-233); GPT-Image 2 is strongest on long structured prompts (MODEL-SPECS section 4); 18,000 keeps the presentations-standard 2,000-char safety margin under the 20,000 API cap.

medium._rationale: Seedream hard-fails silently above 3,000 (MODEL-SPECS:14; SOP-DIU-615:77); 2,800 is the existing MEDIUM cap.

short_draft._rationale: SHORT exists for drafts/ideation only; a SHORT-tier output is NEVER a client deliverable.
